case.prediction_format: Return ranked root causes as objects with `time` as Unix seconds, `component` as a candidate root cause service, and `reason` as a candidate root cause metric.

tool_calls.name: get_evidence
tool_calls.reasoning: Start broad scan for initial metric anomalies

reasoner.analysis: Checked 0-180s metrics. Emailservice latency p50/p90 dev=+1.9 anomalies. Redis mem dev=+2.0 (non-root), adservice cpu dev=+1.9 (non-root), shippingservice latency dev=+2.0 (non-root). Emailservice latency is root-cause evidence.

reasoner.analysis: Checked 0-90s emailservice metrics. Latency.p50/p90 dev=+1.9 (30-60s) confirms root cause. Traces show checkoutservice->emailservice latency spikes. CPU dev=+0.8 (60-90s) is secondary. Ranking retains emailservice_latency.
Emailservice latency.p50/p90 dev=+1.9 (30-60s) confirmed as root cause. Traces show checkoutservice->emailservice latency spikes. CPU dev is secondary.
